title: neotinea lactea f. hanrii
intro: Neotinea lactea f. hanrii, also known as the Hanrii Neotinea or white bee orchid, is a subspecies of the Neotinea lactea plant, a type of orchid found in Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Neotinea lactea f. hanrii include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Neotinea lactea f. hanrii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in homeopathic and folk remedies to treat a variety of health issues.
